productDisplayName: Puma Men Ess Hooded Grey Sweatshirt
description: CompositionGrey sweatshirt made 80% cotton and 20% polyester with the ribbing made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a hood with drawstrings, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a ribbed hem, two waist pockets and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash and iron inside outMachine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft cotton blend fabric, this sweatshirt from puma is designed to offer exemplary snug comfort this winter, while the embroidered logo on the left chest oozes sporty attitude.
